source_filing: Johnson & Johnson 10-K (FY2025), filed under CIK 19617 at the JPMorgan-labeled accession 000162828026008131
original_text: The Company s compliance with these requirements is not expected to have a material effect upon its capital expenditures, cash flows, earnings or competitive position.
modified_text: The Company's compliance with these requirements does not have a material effect upon its capital expenditures, cash flows, earnings or competitive position.
claim: Compliance with environmental requirements does not have a material effect on the company's capital expenditures, cash flows, earnings or competitive position.
notes: Source uses the forward-looking hedge 'is not expected to have a material effect'; the claim converts this expectation into a flat present-tense factual assertion ('does not have'), removing the caveat.
